title: About Me
intro: Welcome to my website. I have been practicing as a lawyer for over 15 years and am at your disposal with sound expertise.
bio: I completed my law degree at the university and, after years of working at large law firms, established my own practice in 2015. My focus areas are family law, employment law, and general civil law.
vita: 2010-2015: Employed lawyer at a large law firm
